response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Full Stack Engineer with over 10+ years of progressive roles, including recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. His expertise spans the full stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java), with a strong focus on scalability, performance, and clean architecture. His open-source contributions, leadership in workshops, and hands-on experience with cloud platforms and testing frameworks align well with the role's requirements. Minor concerns include limited experience with Vitest and Nest.js, though these can be addressed during the interview.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience across multiple industries and technologies
Strong background in AI-agent development, cloud platforms (AWS/GCP), and containerization
Demonstrated leadership in testing frameworks, CI/CD, and community contributions (workshops, open-source)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Vitest in production environments
Minimal exposure to Nest.js in resume; may require ramp-up time
Early-stage role at re:cinq (April 2025–present) lacks detailed project outcomes for assessment
